example: 
Dec 7, 2017 - BTC at 65% dominance, global market cap at $425B

One month later...

Jan 7, 2018 - BTC at 33% dominance, global market cap peaks at $825B

BTC dominance cut in half; market size doubles.

This is money funneling to alts.

BTC price on Dec 7 was $15k

BTC can grow while it's dominance is fading. When the dominance % pushes lower EVEN WHILE BTC'S PRICE IS RISING, this is a strong indicator the hard switch to alts is coming.
